name: Filter
description: Composable faceted filter builder with chips.

api.name: Filter
api.description: Composable faceted filter builder with chips.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: Content rendered above the pills row — typically the filter input controls (dropdowns, search box) that produce the active filters.

parameters.name: Pills
parameters.description: Manually-composed filter pills, rendered alongside any pills generated from Filters.

parameters.name: Actions
parameters.description: Trailing content rendered after the pills row — typically a "clear all" button or similar bulk action.

parameters.name: Filters
parameters.description: Data-driven filter model (#319): when supplied, the bar renders a dismissable FilterPill per descriptor (Field / Operator / Value) and raises OnRemoveFilter on dismiss. The Pills slot still works and renders alongside, so this is purely additive.

parameters.name: OnRemoveFilter
parameters.description: Invoked with the descriptor of a data-driven pill (from Filters) when its dismiss (×) button is clicked.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the root container.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes splatted onto the root container.

events.name: OnRemoveFilter
events.description: Invoked with the descriptor of a data-driven pill (from Filters) when its dismiss (×) button is clicked.

records.name: FilterDescriptor
records.signature: FilterDescriptor(string Field, string? Operator = null, string? Value = null)
records.description: A single active filter: a field, an optional comparison operator (e.g. "=", ">", "contains"), and a display value.

examples.title: Filters with various field types
examples.code:
<FilterBar>
    <ChildContent>
        <Flex Gap="2" Align="center">
            <DropdownMenu>
                <DropdownMenuTrigger>
                    <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Outline" Size="Button.ButtonSize.Sm">
                        <DynamicIcon Name="SlidersHorizontal" Class="h-3.5 w-3.5 mr-1.5" />
                        Add Filter
                    </Button>
                </DropdownMenuTrigger>
                <DropdownMenuContent>
                    <DropdownMenuItem OnClick="@(() => ToggleField("Status"))">Status</DropdownMenuItem>
                    <DropdownMenuItem OnClick="@(() => ToggleField("Priority"))">Priority</DropdownMenuItem>
                </DropdownMenuContent>
            </DropdownMenu>

            @if (_fields.Contains("Status"))
            {
                <Select Value="@_status" ValueChanged="v => _status = v">
                    <SelectTrigger Class="w-[160px] h-8 text-xs">
                        <Lumeo.Text As="span">@(_status == "" ? "Status" : $"Status: {_status}")</Lumeo.Text>
                    </SelectTrigger>
                    <SelectContent>
                        <SelectItem Value="Active">Active</SelectItem>
                    </SelectContent>
                </Select>
            }
        </Flex>
    </ChildContent>
    <Pills>
        @if (_status != "")
        {
            <FilterPill Label="Status" Value="@_status" OnDismiss="@(() => _status = "")" />
        }
    </Pills>
</FilterBar>

examples.title: Filters with search input
examples.code:
<FilterBar>
    <ChildContent>
        <Flex Gap="2" Align="center">
            <Input placeholder="Search..." Value="@_search"
                   OnInput="e => _search = e.Value?.ToString() ?? """ Class="h-8 w-[220px] text-xs" />
            <Select Value="@_role" ValueChanged="v => _role = v">
                <SelectTrigger Class="w-[150px] h-8 text-xs">
                    <Lumeo.Text As="span">@(_role == "" ? "Role" : _role)</Lumeo.Text>
                </SelectTrigger>
                <SelectContent>
                    <SelectItem Value="Admin">Admin</SelectItem>
                </SelectContent>
            </Select>
        </Flex>
    </ChildContent>
    <Pills>
        @if (_search != "")
        {
            <FilterPill Label="Search" Value="@_search" OnDismiss="@(() => _search = "")" />
        }
    </Pills>
</FilterBar>

examples.title: Filters with multi-select
examples.code:
<FilterBar>
    <ChildContent>
        <DropdownMenu>
            <DropdownMenuTrigger>
                <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Outline" Size="Button.ButtonSize.Sm">
                    Category: @_categories.Count selected
                </Button>
            </DropdownMenuTrigger>
            <DropdownMenuContent>
                @foreach (var cat in _allCategories)
                {
                    <Flex Gap="2" Align="center" Class="px-2 py-1.5">
                        <Checkbox Checked="@_categories.Contains(cat)"
                                  CheckedChanged="@(v => Toggle(cat, v))" />
                        <Lumeo.Text As="span" Size="sm">@cat</Lumeo.Text>
                    </Flex>
                }
            </DropdownMenuContent>
        </DropdownMenu>
    </ChildContent>
    <Pills>
        @foreach (var cat in _categories)
        {
            <FilterPill Label="Category" Value="@cat"
                        OnDismiss="@(() => _categories.Remove(cat))" />
        }
    </Pills>
</FilterBar>

examples.code: @if (_status != "") { } @foreach (var item in FilteredItems) { ... }

parameters.name: Label
parameters.description: The filtered field's name, shown as the pill's leading label (and in the dismiss button's aria-label).

parameters.name: Operator
parameters.description: Optional comparison operator shown between Label and Value (e.g. "=", ">", "contains"). When null the pill reads "Label: Value". (#319)

parameters.name: Value
parameters.description: The filter's display value, shown after Label (and Operator when set).

parameters.name: OnDismiss
parameters.description: Invoked when the pill's dismiss (×) button is clicked.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the pill's underlying Badge.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes splatted onto the pill's underlying Badge.

events.name: OnDismiss
events.description: Invoked when the pill's dismiss (×) button is clicked.

slots.name: Pills

slots.name: Actions

mdSummary:
# Filter

Composable faceted filter builder with chips.

**Package:** `Lumeo.DataGrid` · **Category:** Data Display/Tables
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/filter

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Filter | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | Content rendered above the pills row — typically the filter input controls (dropdowns, search box) that produce the active filters. |
| Filter | Pills | `RenderFragment?` | `` | Manually-composed filter pills, rendered alongside any pills generated from Filters. |
| Filter | Actions | `RenderFragment?` | `` | Trailing content rendered after the pills row — typically a "clear all" button or similar bulk action. |
| Filter | Filters | `IReadOnlyList<FilterDescriptor>?` | `` | Data-driven filter model (#319): when supplied, the bar renders a dismissable FilterPill per descriptor (Field / Operator / Value) and raises OnRemoveFilter on dismiss. The Pills slot still works and renders alongside, so this is purely additive. |
| Filter | OnRemoveFilter | `EventCallback<FilterDescriptor>` | `` | Invoked with the descriptor of a data-driven pill (from Filters) when its dismiss (×) button is clicked. |
| Filter | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the root container. |
| Filter | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Unmatched attributes splatted onto the root container. |
| FilterPill | Label | `string` | `""` | The filtered field's name, shown as the pill's leading label (and in the dismiss button's aria-label). |
| FilterPill | Operator | `string?` | `` | Optional comparison operator shown between Label and Value (e.g. "=", ">", "contains"). When null the pill reads "Label: Value". (#319) |
| FilterPill | Value | `string` | `""` | The filter's display value, shown after Label (and Operator when set). |
| FilterPill | OnDismiss | `EventCallback` | `` | Invoked when the pill's dismiss (×) button is clicked. |
| FilterPill | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the pill's underlying Badge. |
| FilterPill | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Unmatched attributes splatted onto the pill's underlying Badge. |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (Filter) — Content rendered above the pills row — typically the filter input controls (dropdowns, search box) that produce the active filters.
- `Pills` (Filter) — Manually-composed filter pills, rendered alongside any pills generated from Filters.
- `Actions` (Filter) — Trailing content rendered after the pills row — typically a "clear all" button or similar bulk action.

## Events
- `OnRemoveFilter` (`EventCallback<FilterDescriptor>`) — Invoked with the descriptor of a data-driven pill (from Filters) when its dismiss (×) button is clicked.

## Sub-components
- `FilterBar`, `FilterPill`

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- (none)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<Filter />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-muted`, `--color-ring`, `--radius`

## Files
- `UI/Filter/FilterBar.razor`
- `UI/Filter/FilterPill.razor`
